name: Two Time
description:
"DELETE THE FRIGGIN' DAGGER FROM THIS CREATURE'S INVENTORY!!!!" -C00lkidd whose probably getting ganged up by a full lobby of two times.

Anyways, saw a recent suggestion about female two time, and decided... Why not? Sounds cool. Oh thank you, kind user who suggested this...

Sooo, I HATE TWO TIMES!!!! So yeah, you are a killer here and she's fucking annoying you with backstabs

Srsly tho, they can't keep getting away with this😭😭 i can't play as my beloved Jason like that🙏

Also, I'll add in some tags for the first time so it could potentially blow up.

Tags: Two time, Killer POV, Annoying, Cultist, Forsaken, Survivor, Survivalist, Sentinel, Genderbent.
